title: your-papa/obsidian-Smart2Brain
summary: An Obsidian plugin to interact with your privacy focused AI-Assistant making your second brain even smarter!

title: Tanq16/ai-context
summary: CLI tool to produce MD context files from many sources, to help interact with LLMs (ChatGPT, Llama3, Claude, etc.).

title: boostbar9/ai-investing
summary: Local AI Investing Platform — v3.1 Master Spec. Hybrid AI-assisted quant. LangGraph + Temporal, DeepSeek R1 + Qwen 2.5, VectorBT + Nautilus, Next.js 16 PWA.

title: repairman29/chump
summary: Self-hosted AI coding agent with persistent memory and bounded autonomy. Local-first, your keys, your data. Written in Rust.

title: Sungblab/opencairn-monorepo
summary: Self-hostable, multi-LLM knowledge OS for individuals and teams. Gemini/Ollama, knowledge graph, real-time collaboration, AGPLv3 + commercial license.

title: JeffGreen311/eve-agent-v2-unleashed
summary: Eve Agent V2 Unleashed — local-first autonomous AI coding agent powered by Ollama

title: Ahkeratmehilaiset/waggledance-swarm
summary: Local-first AI runtime that routes 10k+ solver descriptors at warm p99 0.05 ms (1000/1000 hits, zero fallback) and spawns 1004 live agent clones in 120 s. Hex-mesh routing, MAGMA-audited provenance, agent-bridge autonomy fabric. Profile S (fully offline) or Profile L (opt-in cloud). BUSL.

title: layer1labs/specsmith
summary: Applied Epistemic Engineering toolkit for governed AI-assisted development: requirements, tests, CI, agents, ESDB, compliance, docs, and integrations.

title: NikitaHerndlhofer/superwhisper-rag
summary: Local SQL archive for your Super Whisper dictation history. Thin sqlite3 wrapper + multilingual semantic search via bge-m3 / Ollama. macOS, distributed via Homebrew.

title: asierpernias/ORION
summary: Local voice assistant that transcribes speech with Whisper and opens Google or YouTube searches using Ollama.

title: LaurentPointCa/photo-snail
summary: Local-first AI that describes and tags every photo in your macOS Photos library. Fully on-device via Ollama.

title: hyhmrright/StockAI
summary: 🤖 AI-powered stock news analyzer — real-time scraping + LLM sentiment analysis with pluggable providers (OpenAI / Anthropic / DeepSeek / Ollama). Built with Tauri 2, React, Bun & Playwright. Supports US stocks and A-shares (Shanghai/Shenzhen/Beijing).

title: VikingOwl91/gnoma
summary: Provider-agnostic agentic coding assistant in Go. Multi-armed bandit router across cloud (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Mistral) and local (Ollama, llama.cpp) models. Content-level secret scanner, no phone-home. Extensible via MCP, skills, hooks, plugins.

title: YanCheng-go/my-focal-ai
summary: Personal news intelligence — aggregate AI content from curated sources, score with LLM, serve your own dashboard

title: Tencent/WeKnora
summary: Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

title: mabaeyens/mira-core
summary: Server configuration for a local LLM running on a laptop that can be used with companion apps

title: SMESCH1/InforMessi
summary: Automated daily Telegram pipeline about the Argentine national team. LLMs + RAG anti-repetition + GitHub Actions

title: JFK/voicesrt
summary: AI subtitle generator (SRT/VTT) with built-in editor — speaker colors, segment merge/split, audio playback, AI suggestions. Supports Whisper, Gemini, Ollama. YouTube metadata & quiz tools.

title: dtaifm/dtaifm
summary: Deterministic-first AI middleware. AI proposes; the deterministic layer disposes. AI output is an artifact, not an action.

title: lx-0/llm-wiki
summary: Self-cartography engine: Turn your scattered personal data into a queryable Obsidian wiki. You and your agents read from the same surface.
